title: Watch: Video appears to show US F-15 fighter jet crashing in Kuwait
summary_full: The US says six of its F-15 jets were "mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses", with all crew in a stable condition.
summary_public: The US says six of its F-15 jets were "mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses", with all crew in a stable condition.
